header: See how Northwind cut onboarding from weeks to days
quote: We cut new-hire onboarding from three weeks to two days and finally retired four spreadsheets. Managers can see exactly where every request stands, and the team adopted it without a single training session.

poster_image.title: Planning on a laptop
